Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "INGIT AS COWORK-NATIVE WORKSPACE SUBSTRATE.md"
tags:
  * architecture
  * anthropic
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. INGIT AS COWORK-NATIVE WORKSPACE SUBSTRATE.md


{quote}- [[249-composite-skills-agent-md]] (сходство 0.11){quote}

----





h2. INGIT AS COWORK-NATIVE WORKSPACE SUBSTRATE.md
markdown
{code:language=markdown}
# InGit as Cowork-Native Workspace Substrate

<!-- similar-docs -->

---

- [[249-composite-skills-agent-md]] (сходство 0.11)
- [[208-professional-colleague-agents-md]] (сходство 0.11)
